blocks.body: Yes/No Questions (general questions) are questions that can be answered with "yes" or "no". They are the simplest type of question in the English language and are formed by inverting the subject and the auxiliary verb.

{ "title": "9. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Yes/No Questions — questions with the answer "yes" or "no". Are you...? Is she...? Were they...?", "З Simple Tenses — використовуємо do/does/did перед підметом.", "З to be — міняємо місцями дієслово і підмет: Are you...? Is she...? Were they...?", "With modals is a modal verb before the subject: Can you...? Will she...? Should we...?", "With have got — inversion of have/has: Have you got...? Has she got...?", "With Continuous — inversion of am/is/are/was/were: Are you working? Was she sleeping?", "With Perfect - inversion of have/has: Have you seen...? Has she finished...?", "Basic rule - the auxiliary verb always precedes the subject!" ] }
